top_documents.title: Peripheral blood biomarkers linked to preclinical Alzheimer's disease progression.
top_documents.abstract_snippet: Peripheral blood biomarker panels were associated with early cognitive decline trajectories and showed promise for preclinical screening in longitudinal cohorts.

top_documents.title: Neuroinflammation signatures and early cognitive decline in mild impairment cohorts.
top_documents.abstract_snippet: Inflammatory signatures in peripheral samples correlated with conversion risk and offered an interpretable bridge between immunology and early dementia progression.

top_documents.title: Longitudinal plasma protein changes preceding Alzheimer's diagnosis.
top_documents.abstract_snippet: Serial proteomic measurements identified several circulating proteins that shifted before clinical diagnosis, suggesting a broader surveillance signal.

top_documents.title: Amyloid-associated serum panels for identifying early-stage Alzheimer's disease.
top_documents.abstract_snippet: Serum-based amyloid marker combinations improved classification of early-stage disease and reflected the language commonly used in diagnostic studies.

top_documents.title: Clinical biomarker review for differential diagnosis of early neurodegenerative disease.
top_documents.abstract_snippet: This review synthesizes biomarker terminology across related neurodegenerative disorders, which helps lexical systems even when the article is broader than the query.
